fields.Name: Magic Link Baseline
fields.Description: Restricted role for external users who enter MJ via a magic-link invite. Grants no entity access by default (deny-all baseline). Per-deployment, attach Entity Permissions to this role scoped to ONLY the entities the shared Application exposes — this is the real authorization boundary that keeps external users out of the rest of MJ. Never assign this role to internal/SSO users.

fields.Name: Widget Guest
fields.Description: Restricted role for anonymous public web-widget visitors (see plans/realtime/bridges-and-widget/public-web-widget.md). Grants ONLY read/create/update on Conversations + Conversation Details so a guest can hold a support conversation — and nothing else. This is the D5 authorization backstop: combined with the widget's pinned support agent, it prevents a public visitor from reaching arbitrary agents or data. Never assign to internal/SSO users.
